aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags that are passed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by tag keys that are passed in the request

license-manager:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tag key-value pairs attached to the resource
